Victory gate ships ahead of .v proof per HIVE.md §0. INV-7 has no .v file yet (slated for L0). 14 tests including 8 explicit falsification witnesses (R8): JEPA-MSE proxy band [0,0.1] rejected, pre-warmup steps rejected, duplicate seeds rejected, BPB==target rejected (strict <), non-finite rejected, padding with non-passing still insufficient. L-R14: JEPA_PROXY_BPB_FLOOR=0.1 mirrors invariants::check_bpb proxy band. VICTORY_SEED_TARGET pulled from hive_automaton, IGLA_TARGET_BPB from lib.rs, INV2_WARMUP_BLIND_STEPS from invariants — zero new magic numbers in this file. R6 forbids touching them; recommend L5 owner re-export TrialConfig as InvTrialConfig and L10 owner add LUCAS_1 const back to invariants.rs.

EMA tracker: numerically-stable, NaN-poisoning-proof. Default decay alpha_phi^-3 = 1/(2*PHI+1) ≈ 0.236, anchored via debug_assert against PHI from invariants (L-R14 trace). Bias-corrected variant (Adam-style) refuses to compute when n_updates=0 (NoUpdatesYet variant). EmaError closed enum: AlphaOutOfRange, NonFiniteObservation, NoUpdatesYet. 7 falsifications: alpha=0, alpha<0, alpha>1, alpha=NaN, NaN obs, ±∞ obs, bias_corrected before any update. 2 anchor guards: phi-derivation drift, bounds canonical. First update seeds exactly (no zero-bias decay artefact). Pre-existing main breakage from L5 InvTrialConfig + L10 LUCAS_1 still blocks cargo build globally — not L6 regressions.

Pure-Rust worker pool with single-writer mutex on CSV sink composes the LR sampler (L8), invariants gate (L5), and rung schedule (L10) without re-exporting any module. Reconciled stale LUCAS_1 / InvTrialConfig references introduced by ALPHA's L5 commit so the lib once again compiles. Atomic L11 ships in one commit on main per R3/R10.

QK-head shape & scale guard. QkHead::new(d_model, num_heads) refuses 6 misconfiguration classes via closed QkHeadError enum: DModelBelowInv3, ZeroHeads, TooManyHeads, DModelNotDivisible, HeadDimBelowPhiFloor, ScaleInvalid. L-R14: PHI_4 = 3*PHI + 2 (algebraic identity for φ⁴), HEAD_DIM_PHI_FLOOR = ceil(φ⁴) = 7, INV3_D_MODEL_MIN consumed from invariants. 7 falsifications (R8): d_model<256, d_model=255 boundary, num_heads=0, num_heads>64, non-divisible (257 prime), head_dim=4 (256/64), head_dim=6 boundary. 4 anchor guards + scale numerical guard. Pre-existing main breakage from L5/L10 still blocks cargo build globally.

BpbTracker composes L6 EMA + L7 victory predicates. record() refuses pre-warmup, JEPA-proxy (≤0.1), NaN/±∞ at source — corruption-resistant: rejection leaves state untouched. seed_result(sha) builds victory::SeedResult for L7 gate end-to-end. has_crossed_target uses strict < per L7. composition_three_seeds test demonstrates BpbTracker→SeedResult→check_victory pipeline is wired correctly. From<EmaError> for BpbError makes alpha validation propagate cleanly through ::new(). Pinned step==warmup as ACCEPTED (mirrors L7 r.step < warmup semantics) — boundary test renamed admit_warmup_boundary_step_accepted to encode the semantic. 17/17 tests passed locally; 0 clippy warnings on owned files.
CI gate now schema-validates assertions JSON and runs invariants tests as blocking step; clippy sweep clean across 4 sites.

GF16 floor as closed Gf16Error (DModelBelowFloor / ErrorAboveBound / NonFiniteError); dual-band policy preserved (certified φ⁻⁶ surfaced at runtime, empirical band JSON-only). 7 R8 falsification witnesses + 4 anchor guards + 5 boundary acceptance + 3 composite + 3 display = 23 tests. R6 honored — no edit to invariants.rs InvError; mirrors L5 anchors INV3_D_MODEL_MIN and INV3_ERROR_BOUND. Cross-checked PHI⁻⁶ algebraic identity at runtime (1e-3 tolerance).
